overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through a dark forest at night, approaching and passing a small wooden settlement with a torch-lit signpost. The scene features atmospheric low lighting with a blue-green color grade typical of the game's nighttime environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail through mixed birch and pine woods

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the dark forest, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt path with patches of grass and small rocks
white-barked birch trees lining the left side of the path
dark evergreen trees visible on the right hillside
tall grass and undergrowth flanking both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dark forest at night. The path is flanked by birch trees with white bark and patches of tall grass, while pine trees are visible on the sloping terrain to the right. The environment is quiet and empty, with only the sounds of footsteps on the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: small wooden settlement with huts and fencing

events.description: wooden huts and fence structures come into view, indicating a small rural settlement
warm torch light becomes visible ahead, contrasting with the cool moonlight

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking through the settlement area, approaching a torch-lit wooden signpost on the right side of the path

entered.detail: small rustic wooden cabin with sloped roof visible on the right side of the path
simple wooden post fence running along the left side of the trail
burning torch on a wooden post providing warm orange illumination
weathered wooden sign with carved directional arrows mounted near the torch

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into a small settlement area with wooden huts and fencing. Geralt walks past a rustic cabin on the right, approaching a burning torch that casts warm light on a wooden signpost. The environment transitions from dense forest to a cleared area with man-made structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail continuing beyond the settlement

events.description: passing the torch and signpost, leaving the settlement behind and re-entering dense forest

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks past the torch and continues along the trail as the settlement recedes behind him

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes the torch and signpost, leaving the small settlement behind. The trail continues into denser forest with pine trees closing in on both sides. The warm torch light fades as the character proceeds deeper into the dark woods along the winding dirt path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark forest that briefly opens into a torch-lit settlement before returning to the dense wilderness. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail flanked by white-barked birch trees and sloping pine-covered terrain. As the path clears, the dense forest transitions into a small settlement area where the camera passes a rustic wooden cabin and a burning torch that casts a warm glow over a signpost. The scene then shifts back toward the wilderness as Geralt moves past the light, leaving the man-made structures behind. Finally, the warm illumination fades as the trail winds deeper into the dark woods, with pine trees closing in on both sides once again.
